name: large-language-models
description: Enables access to LLMs via remote providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) and local LLMs via GPT4ALL

scripts.build: node scripts/check-manifest.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && tsc -noEmit -p test && node scripts/stage-plugin.mjs && wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts

author: Evan Harris, Ryan Mahoney
